members.name: Jamie Dimon
members.title: Chairman and CEO
members.bio: Leading JPMorgan Chase with focus on technology investment exceeding $15B annually. Champions AI and data science across the firm.

members.name: Linda Bammann
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former Deputy Head of Risk Management. Expertise in risk analytics and quantitative modeling.

members.name: Todd Combs
members.title: Director
members.bio: Investment manager at Berkshire Hathaway. Background in financial technology and analytics.

members.name: Virginia Rometty
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former CEO of IBM. Deep expertise in artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and digital transformation. Led IBM's Watson AI strategy.

members.name: Phebe Novakovic
members.title: Director
members.bio: CEO of General Dynamics. Experience in defense technology and cybersecurity.

members.name: Tim Chen
members.title: Director
members.bio: CEO of DiversyFund. Background in financial technology, data analytics and machine learning applications in fintech.

strategy_text: JPMorgan Chase continues to invest over $15 billion annually in technology. AI and machine learning are strategic priorities across risk management, fraud detection, and customer experience. The firm has deployed AI in production across multiple business lines.
